faqs.question: What exactly happens after ordering?
faqs.answer: Once your order is placed, you will receive a confirmation email with your order details. Our team processes orders within 1-2 business days before dispatching.

faqs.question: Do I receive an invoice for my order?
faqs.answer: Yes, an invoice is automatically sent to your registered email address after each successful purchase.

faqs.question: Is refund possible?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer refunds within 30 days of purchase. Please contact our support team to initiate the process.

faqs.question: Delivery charges for orders from the Online Shop?
faqs.answer: Standard delivery is free on orders over $50. For orders below that threshold, a flat rate of $5.99 applies.

faqs.question: What is 'package tracking' in my orders?
faqs.answer: Package tracking allows you to monitor the real-time status and location of your shipment via a tracking number sent to your email.

faqs.question: Can I change or cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Orders can be modified or cancelled within 2 hours of placement. After that, the order enters processing and changes may not be possible.

faqs.question: Can I change or cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Please contact our support team as soon as possible if you need to make changes. We will do our best to accommodate your request.
